feedItems.description: allocated £7.1m to Environment & Streets (≈£51 per resident)
allocated £2.6m to Culture & Leisure (≈£19 per resident)
allocated £4.4m to Planning & Development (≈£32 per resident)
allocated £4.9m to Council Running Costs (≈£35 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £100 (4.8%) to £2201
